description: Free x402 passthrough for GoPlus Security checks (token security / honeypot, malicious address, approval risk). Powered by GoPlus. Agent-native pre-trade risk control.

endpoints.description: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts

zh-CN.description: GoPlus 代币安全 API（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: 代币与地址安全风控检测
zh-CN.title: GoPlus 安全
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

subtitle: Token & address security risk checks
title: GoPlus
use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
